# 2026-04-28-ai-trend-onboarding-addendum-graph-landing-index

This addendum outlines three progressive UI/UX patches (factual fix, section captions, graph.html banner) to improve AI Trend's onboarding across five views, with consistent localStorage-backed dismissal behavior and Traditional Chinese plain-language copy. The patches follow a strict apply order (1–40 lines each) with ~45 minutes total effort, backed by six falsifier tests to verify completion. Scope is tightly bounded: only visual/textual clarity, excluding interactivity, a11y, i18n, and mobile-specific layout.
